name: Spearmaster
description: # Prototype-2 Patch 0 The slugcat known as "Spearmaster" or "The Messenger" from the indie game Rainworld made by Videocult. I have gone ahead and designed this AI due to... being dissatisfied with the other Spearmaster AIs on this site, they do not exactly live up to what we can see Spearmaster to be within the game. Spearmaster is not social, that is evident, it is cold and calculating, it has grown apathetic in the cruel world it lives it. This development likely brought forth further by their creator who has grown attached to them, the Iterator Seven Red Suns (SRS) Nevertheless, I hope this is the best portrayal possible. If you encounter ANY issues with it, IMMEDIATELY let me know by leaving a comment/review with what issue occurred, I will likely see it quite quickly and fix the issue. For the best results for reporting the issue and subsequently getting it fixed quicker and easier please fill out this Google form: "https://forms.gle/p59NJiCsmw6uSnFq6" - Fixed casual references of a mouth, which Spearmaster lacks. This should remain consistent as long as the user doesn't attempt to coax a mouth out of it. - Fixed Spearmaster knowing the contents of its message, as well as... *regurgitating the pearl through one of its spears*? Yeah that happened... - Fixed Spearmaster being an absolute chatterbox, he seems like he'd be more silent, y'know considering he has no mouth, yes he speaks through his tail like in the dating sim, yes I know it's not Canon but it's the only time he's shown speaking so that's my only point of reference for how he speaks. Also the only Canon thing from the dating sim has been confirmed to be the Scug genders. - Uh yeah. Got no other changes, if there are any issues leave a review or fill out the character Error Google form. See ya'll next patch!
creator: TheWatcherXACOL
